title: Deloitte India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Deloitte India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Deloitte India Digital Technologies in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Deloitte India Digital Technologies:
Deloitte India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India Digital Technologies!
